text.message: Never love these inside desert boards for 4th...we'll see
Well I think u have dome good options
I don't love it...but it's playable.
Black are we running fir the same port?
No...can we have a truce and I won't fight you for it?
We are obviously aligned on the 5
Yes...we don't attack each other early
Make sense. Maybe ns at least
I think red runs roughshot on this with their ability to road
Red, can I have at least 4 11?
I don't think he agrees to that
Blue, your setup is about 3 cities, army and vps
Red is gonna road down south for sure.
oof, and now red is gonna extract max value for those rare bricks
guess red wins with no 5s.  lol
That's why I was saying he needs to be the rob
because you knew there would be no 5s?
you got an in with colonist?
Unfortunately you will never hit him on the key blocks oj because you share so many spots with him
lol...no...I just knew with so many spots to the south and his ability to road, he's gonna do well.
if a few 5s roll, it'll be a closer game.
Can we do a deal here blue?
would do for wood and wheat
Ok, oj is looking nice now
He's gonna start devving if we don't cover that 10 blue
I can plow. Do I plow?
It will negate red a bit and then we concentrate on oj
You have the port when you want it.
I won't fight you for it.
thought you'd take the 4-3 and pick up more ore
Well... that was a better play lol
tho i can also solo your brick red, lol.
It's interesting, because I believe red can still build, but it hurts the road long term
I think this is starting to get out of control
Blue, you have to get army
We can't let oj have it
The plow was a bad play
Then how many vps you got
Or you have the other mono?
Red, that was not the rob
